prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次依次约 2751→3047→3584→4209→4398，呈持续后移趋势，近 4 年累计后移约 1647 名，年均约 412 名；2025 年基准约 4398 名；该校在辽宁省物理类招生计划 2021–2025 年分别为 197→195→199→187→186 人，整体稳中略降；2026 年计划 159 人，较 2025 年缩招 27 人（-14.5%），缩招幅度明显，理论上使录取位次前移、竞争略有缓和。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 天津大学为 985、211、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2021 年第 22 名→2022–2023 年第 21 名→2024–2026 年稳居第 20 名，排名持续小幅上升，属于全国顶尖高校梯队；2026 年高考周期声誉评价为「偏负面」，主要涉及学校管理回应与师德师风事件，但整体舆情热度一般；抖音综合热度排名第 66 位（评价「一般」），短视频曝光量处于中游水平，未出现明显报考恐慌或过热信号；第五轮学科评估中 A- 及以上学科达 20 个，其中化学工程与技术、管理科学与工程为 A+，仪器科学与技术、光学工程、动力工程及工程热物理、土木工程、建筑学、城乡规划学、机械工程、水利工程等为 A/A-，工科实力极为雄厚，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等核心工科专业在 2026 年专业热度分析中均获「高热推荐」或「推荐」评级，社会报考意愿强烈；辽宁省 2026 年高考总人数约 20 万（较 2025 年总 19.97 万基本持平），按近年比例估算物理类考生约 14.36 万，与 2025 年 14.34 万基本持平，竞争基数未明显扩大；天津大学位于天津市，与辽宁省地理相邻、交通便利，历来是辽宁考生报考的热门选择之一；该校在辽宁招生规模较大（物理类常年 180+ 人），本地认可度较高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年大幅缩招（-14.5%）使位次前移的供需弹性主值、学校顶尖层次与强大工科优势学科的持续吸引力、以及声誉偏负面但热度一般的综合信号，以反映学校综合实力对报考竞争的支撑作用；预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 4045 名，区间 3584–4506 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（国家特色化示范性软件学院智能与计算类）（计算机科学与技术、人工智能、软件工程、网络空间安全）
- 工科试验班（国家未来技术学院）（具身智能、人工智能、柔性电子、脑机接口、集成电路等方向）
- 工科试验班（电气信息类）（电气工程及其自动化、电子信息工程、通信工程等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（国家示范性微电子学院集成电路类）（电子科学与技术（微电子）、集成电路设计与集成系统）
- 工科试验班（国家试点学院精仪与光电信息类）（测控技术与仪器、光电信息科学与工程、智能感知工程）
- 光电信息科学与工程（与南开大学合办）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

- 工科试验班（智慧化工与绿色低碳类）（化学工程与工艺、精细化工、过程装备与控制工程等）
- 工科试验班（智能制造与建造）（机械设计制造及其自动化、土木工程、能源与动力工程等）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 3584–4506 名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业作为冲刺、三档专业稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<3600 名）可重点冲击智能与计算类、未来技术学院等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>4400 名）应以三档专业为主，争取进入天大平台后再通过大类分流或转专业机制调整方向。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 2751→3047→3584→4209→4398, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1647 places over the past 4 years, averaging about 412 places per year; the baseline for 2025 is about 4398 places; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Liaoning Province from 2021 to 2025 was 197→195→199→187→186 students, overall stable with a slight decrease; the 2026 plan is 159 students, a reduction of 27 students (-14.5%) compared to 2025, a significant reduction, theoretically causing the admission ranking to move forward and competition to ease slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tianjin University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 22nd in 2021→21st in 2022–2023→steadily 20th in 2024–2026, with a continuous slight upward trend, belonging to the top tier of national universities; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'somewhat negative', mainly involving school management responses and teacher ethics incidents, but overall public opinion heat is moderate; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 66th (evaluation 'average'), short video exposure is at a mid-level, with no obvious signs of application panic or overheating; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 20 disciplines rated A- or above, among which Chemical Engineering and Technology, and Management Science and Engineering are A+, and disciplines such as Instrument Science and Technology, Optical Engineering, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Civil Engineering, Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning, Mechanical Engineering, and Water Resources Engineering are A/A-, with extremely strong engineering strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering all received 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' ratings in the 2026 major popularity analysis, with strong social application willingness; the total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Liaoning Province is about 200,000 (basically flat compared to the total of 199,700 in 2025), with an estimated 143,600 Physics Category candidates based on recent proportions, basically flat compared to 143,400 in 2025, with no significant expansion of the competition base; Tianjin University is located in Tianjin City, geographically adjacent to Liaoning Province with convenient transportation, and has historically been one of the popular choices for Liaoning candidates; the university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Liaoning (Physics Category consistently 180+ students), with high local recognition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-14.5%) causing the main supply-demand elasticity value for ranking to move forward, the continuous attractiveness of the university's top tier and strong engineering advantage disciplines, and the comprehensive signal of a somewhat negative reputation but moderate popularity, reflecting the supporting role of the university's comprehensive strength on application competition; the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 4045, with a range of 3584–4506.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (National Characteristic Demonstration Software College Intelligent and Computing Class) (Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering, Cyberspace Security)
- Engineering Experimental Class (National Future Technology College) (Embodied Intelligence, Artificial Intelligence, Flexible Electronics, Brain-Computer Interface, Integrated Circuits, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electrical and Information Class) (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (National Demonstration Microelectronics College Integrated Circuit Class) (Electronic Science and Technology (Microelectronics), Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems)
- Engineering Experimental Class (National Pilot College Precision Instrument and Optoelectronic Information Class) (Measurement and Control Technology and Instrumentation, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Intelligent Perception Engineering)
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering (Jointly with Nankai University).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (National New Engineering Education Innovation Center) (Choose any university-level master class/all majors)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Chemical Engineering and Green Low-Carbon Class) (Chemical Engineering and Technology, Fine Chemical Engineering, Process Equipment and Control Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Manufacturing and Construction) (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Civil Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3584–4506, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<3600), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Intelligent and Computing Class and Future Technology College; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>4400), mainly choose Tier 3 majors, and strive to adjust direction through major streaming or transfer mechanisms after entering Tianjin University.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年历史类最低位次依次约 383→578→673→1272→1368，呈持续后移趋势，近 4 年累计后移约 985 名，年均约 246 名；2025 年基准约 1368 名；该校在辽宁省历史类招生计划 2021–2025 年分别为 3→5→4→12→15 人，呈持续扩招态势；2026 年计划 42 人，较 2025 年大幅扩招 27 人（+180%），扩招幅度极大，理论上使录取位次大幅后移、竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 天津大学为 985、211、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年稳居第 20 名，属于全国顶尖高校梯队，对文科考生同样具有较高品牌吸引力；2026 年高考周期声誉评价为「偏负面」，主要涉及学校管理回应与师德师风事件，但整体舆情热度一般；抖音综合热度排名第 66 位（评价「一般」），未出现明显报考恐慌或过热信号；天津大学虽以工科见长，但建筑学（A）、城乡规划学（A）、风景园林学（A-）等与历史类招生专业（建筑类）直接相关，学科实力强劲；2026 年新增社会科学试验班（汉语言文学、英语、教育学），拓展文科专业布局。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业在 2026 年专业热度分析中获「分化观望」评级，社会关注度高但竞争分化；汉语言/中文获「推荐」评级，报考意愿较强；辽宁省 2026 年高考总人数约 20 万，按近年比例估算历史类考生约 5.64 万，较 2025 年 5.63 万基本持平，竞争基数未明显扩大；天津大学位于天津市，与辽宁省地理相邻，历来是辽宁考生跨省报考的热门选择；历史类招生计划从 2021 年仅 3 人扩至 2026 年 42 人，表明该校正加大在辽宁文科领域的招生投入。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年大幅扩招（+180%）使位次大幅后移的供需弹性主值、学校顶尖层次对文科考生的品牌吸引力、以及法学/中文等专业热度升温的信号，以反映扩招后实际竞争可能略低于纯模型预期的市场调节效应；预测 2026 年历史类最低位次约 2825 名，区间 2503–3147 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学（设有「涉外法治实验班」双学士学位项目，法学+英语复合型培养）
- 建筑类（城乡规划、风景园林、建筑学（5年制））。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 社会科学试验班（新文科新工科融合创新班）（汉语言文学、英语、教育学）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 2503–3147 名内，历史类仅 2 个招生专业，建议位次优于 2500 名可冲刺法学（涉外法治实验班），位次在 2500–3000 名以建筑类为主攻，位次接近 3100 名以社会科学试验班保底。注意法学与建筑类之间位次差距较大（2025 年法学 486 名 vs 建筑类 1368 名），实际报考时需结合当年专业分组与考生具体排位灵活决策。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the History Category were approximately 383 → 578 → 673 → 1272 → 1368, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 985 places over the past 4 years, averaging about 246 places per year; the 2025 baseline is about 1368 places; the university's enrollment plan for the History Category in Liaoning Province from 2021 to 2025 was 3 → 5 → 4 → 12 → 15 students, showing a continuous expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 42 students, a significant expansion of 27 students (+180%) compared to 2025, with an extremely large expansion rate, theoretically causing a substantial backward shift in admission rankings and significantly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tianjin University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks 20th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top tier of national universities, with high brand appeal to liberal arts candidates; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'somewhat negative', mainly involving school management responses and teacher ethics incidents, but overall public opinion heat is moderate; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 66th (rated 'average'), with no obvious signs of application panic or overheating; although Tianjin University is known for engineering, its Architecture (A), Urban and Rural Planning (A), and Landscape Architecture (A-) are directly related to the History Category enrollment majors (Architecture category), with strong disciplinary strength; in 2026, it added a Social Science Experimental Class (Chinese Language and Literature, English, Education), expanding the liberal arts major layout.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Law major received a 'differentiated wait-and-see' rating in the 2026 major popularity analysis, with high social attention but differentiated competition; Chinese Language/Literature received a 'recommended' rating, with strong application willingness; the total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Liaoning Province is about 200,000, with an estimated 56,400 History Category candidates based on recent proportions, basically unchanged from 56,300 in 2025, so the competition base has not significantly expanded; Tianjin University is located in Tianjin City, geographically adjacent to Liaoning Province, and has historically been a popular cross-provincial choice for Liaoning candidates; the History Category enrollment plan has expanded from only 3 students in 2021 to 42 students in 2026, indicating that the university is increasing its investment in liberal arts enrollment in Liaoning.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the substantial expansion in 2026 (+180%) causing a significant backward shift in rankings due to supply-demand elasticity, the top-tier university's brand appeal to liberal arts candidates, and signals of increased popularity in majors like Law and Chinese Language, while reflecting the market adjustment effect that actual competition after expansion may be slightly lower than pure model predictions; the predicted minimum ranking for the History Category in 2026 is about 2825, with a range of 2503–3147.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law (with 'International Rule of Law Experimental Class' dual bachelor's degree program, Law + English composite training)
- Architecture Category (Urban and Rural Planning, Landscape Architecture, Architecture (5-year)).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Social Science Experimental Class (New Liberal Arts and New Engineering Integration Innovation Class) (Chinese Language and Literature, English, Education).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2503–3147, the History Category has only 2 enrollment majors. It is recommended that candidates with rankings better than 2500 can aim for Law (International Rule of Law Experimental Class), those with rankings between 2500–3000 should focus on the Architecture Category, and those with rankings near 3100 should use the Social Science Experimental Class as a safety option. Note that there is a large ranking gap between Law and Architecture Category (2025: Law 486 vs Architecture Category 1368), so actual application decisions should be made flexibly based on the year's major grouping and the candidate's specific ranking.
